events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: rebar placement rough-complete, bars resting directly on vapor barrier/soil, chairs missing near edge, bars touching side form, placement drawing requires continuous bottom cover, lap splices visible. Need decision fail because non-compliant and dangerous? Work stage rough-complete. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. confidence high. findings: insufficient bottom concrete cover, missing chairs, bars contacting formwork, potential corrosion/spalling. actions: install rebar chairs/supports to maintain bottom cover, adjust bars away from forms, add side cover, re-inspect before pour. rationale. references ACI 318 (cover requirements, support of reinforcement), placing drawings. Need include all fields. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list, workable empty list. Ensure valid JSON.
